description: Monster animation sequences — defines composite animation sequences built from frames of other animation modes. Used for special monster animations that combine multiple modes.

sequence.description: Sequence group identifier (format type 0x11, string lookup)

mode.description: Source animation mode token to pull frames from (e.g. A1, S1, NU)

frame.description: Frame index within the source animation mode

dir.description: Direction index for the animation frame

event.description: Event trigger at this frame (e.g. missile launch, sound play)
